readiness_truth.statement: Under #124 publish-first the launch is gated on a MEASURED >=500 build (land #71, the long pole) AND a human-approved HF-job issue -- NEITHER exists. The served stack is still linear MTP K=7 (the 481.53 frontier); treeverify_served_gain_MEASURED_realized=0.0, so the +18.3% / E[T]_both=4.512 / ~520 TPS tree gain is an UNMEASURED analytic projection, never realized end-to-end. The banked analytic packet (PPL not-binding, accepted private-draw risk, the INFEASIBLE compliant-private lane) is the POST-HOC DEFENCE, NOT a launch trigger. readiness_verdict=NOT-READY; the sole launch blocker is the live tree-decode build delivering a MEASURED >=500.

handoff_line: the #124 decision card reads NOT-READY: no measured >=500 artifact exists (land #71 projection-only), the compliant-PRIVATE-500 lane is INFEASIBLE at the operative ceiling 520.95<528.48, but the public packet is otherwise clean (PPL not binding, accepted private-draw risk 5.8-23.9% at the 0.9675 speed gate) -- so the sole launch blocker is the live tree-decode build delivering a MEASURED >=500.
